target.purpose: The managed-local base head (events slice id < 3) the upsert updates and inserts into.

payload.purpose: The exact managed-local payload revision (events slice 2 <= id < 5) merged by the certified keys.

final.purpose: The one exact child revision: the key union with the payload winning on the matched key (id 2).

checksum_encoding: sha256 of canonical JSON of the ORDER BY id Arrow to_pydict(), sorted keys and compact separators
sanitization: Logical fixture values and counts only; no local paths, raw storage keys, tokens, or artifact URIs.
